results.Query: Add new_EK_PORT_2 to ju1.s1.dom. List direct child nodes of ju1.s1.dom in the updated graph. Return a list of child nodes name.
results.Label: capacity planning, level-3, add-list
results.LLM code:
def process_graph(graph_data):
    graph_copy = graph_data.copy()
    new_EK_PORT_2 = 'ju1.s1.dom.p1'
    graph_copy.add_node(new_EK_PORT_2, name=new_EK_PORT_2, type=['EK_PORT'], physical_capacity_bps=1000)
    graph_copy.add_edge('ju1.s1.dom', new_EK_PORT_2, type='RK_CONTAINS')
    
    child_nodes = [(node[1]['name']) for node in list(graph_copy.nodes(data=True)) if node[0].startswith('ju1.s1.dom.p')]
    data = child_nodes
    return_object = {
        'type': 'list',
        'data': data,
        'updated_graph': nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy)
    }
    return return_object
